axioms.name: State
axioms.statement: A system can be represented by a state phi(t) at time t.

axioms.name: Existence
axioms.statement: Persistent structured phase change constitutes existence.

axioms.name: Interpretive Layer
axioms.statement: Subject, memory, and time are outputs of H(DeltaPhi).

axioms.name: Non-Ontological Subject
axioms.statement: Subject is an interpretive interface, not the root of existence.
